summary: Tested Dashboard Navigation & Mira Memory features. All 6 features passed: Pet card navigation, Back to Home button, Mira memory API, Mira chat memories_used field, Mira Tab memory display, and Remembering you indicator.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard navigation and Mira memory features are fully functional. Pet card clicks navigate to /pet/{petId}. Back to Home button appears on mobile non-overview tabs. Mira memory API returns user memories with counts by type. Mira chat includes memories_used field. MiraTab displays 'What Mira Remembers' section with memory counts. Chat shows 'Remembering you' indicator when memories are used.

pet_card_navigation.details: Clicking pet card on dashboard navigates to /pet/pet-69a33842a68b

back_to_home_button.details: Button appears on mobile view when on non-overview tabs (Requests, Pets, Orders)

mira_memory_api.details: GET /api/mira/memory/me returns user memories with total_memories, by_type (event, health, shopping, general)

mira_chat_memories_used.details: POST /api/mira/chat returns memories_used boolean field in response

mira_tab_memory_display.details: MiraTab shows 'What Mira Remembers' section with Events: 2, Health: 0, Shopping: 0, General: 0

remembering_you_indicator.details: Chat messages show 'Remembering you' indicator with Brain icon when memories are used
